title: Api Token Authorization
excerpt:
Hello 
I am new here. I tried to use the CURL example. 
Could you please tell me what is the expiration time? 
Thanks

posts.author: Cesar (cesar covarrubias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello

I am new here. I tried to use the CURL example.

posts.author: Scott-monday.com (Scott Underwood)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Cesar,

Would you please be so kind as to let me know what CURL example you’re referring to, and where you’re seeing an expiration time?

I’d love to gain a better understand of the issue you’re running into so that I can be sure I’m offering the most relevant answers and support
